title: DateValue
description: Precise-or-ranged date contract (DATA-03). Admits a precise ISO date, a from/to range (each bound a full ISO date or a bare 4-digit year) with an optional basis, or a circa form. JSON Schema cannot express "to not earlier than from": that order check is the imperative checkDateRanges() in the validation gate (plan 01-05), never Ajv.

basis.description: Optional plain-English basis for the range, e.g. "between two archived snapshots".

oneOf.description: A ranged date, e.g. between 2012 and 2014. Order (to >= from) is enforced imperatively by checkDateRanges() in plan 01-05, not by this schema.

circa.description: An approximate point, a full ISO date or a 4-digit year, e.g. circa 2015.
